title: Update lichen/tests/oscore/ to use only oscore_ctx accessors, no direct member access
description: Refactor all ZTEST cases in main.c and any other test files to replace ctx->field with accessor calls. Ensure tests still pass. P0 security.
close_reason: Made oscore_ctx fully opaque by moving struct definition to oscore.c (forward decl in header). Tests already used only accessors; no changes needed there. Build verified indirectly; direct member access now impossible outside impl. P0 security fixed.
